title: Streamproof
description: Streamproof is a fabric windows-only mod that lets you hide specific things from rendering in OBS
body:
## Streamproof ![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/i2jpXoIt) Streamproof is a fabric windows-only mod that lets you hide specific things from rendering in OBS! | platform | link | | --- | --- | | Modrinth | [Download](https://modrinth.com/mod/streamproof/versions/) | | CurseForge | [Download](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/streamproof/files/all) | | GitHub | [Download](https://github.com/xNasuni/streamproof/releases/latest) | #### Help Not working? **Make sure you are using "Game Capture" and targeting the `javaw` Minecraft process** instead of the "Fullscreen Application" option, or the "Screen Capture" which are both unsupported If you need help to figure out how to use this, check out the [Wiki](https://github.com/xNasuni/streamproof/wiki)!
If you want to report a bug or suggest a new feature, make an issue in [Issues](https://github.com/xNasuni/streamproof/issues)!
